world1.headline: diffjudge added to PyPI
world1.deck: AI-powered pull request reviewer. Reviews diffs with any OpenAI-compatible model and posts the review. Zero dependencies.
world1.teaser: AI-powered pull request reviewer. Reviews diffs with any OpenAI-compatible model and posts the review. Zero dependencies.
body: AI-powered pull request reviewer. Reviews diffs with any OpenAI-compatible model and posts the review. Zero dependencies. AI-powered pull request reviewer with zero dependencies. diffjudge fetches a pull request's diff, asks a language model to review it, and either prints the review or posts it back as a PR comment.
